I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

input.initialPrompt: I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run the tests in this project with `dotnet test` and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the tests with the appropriate blame-crash options.

data.content: Tests ran successfully with `--blame-crash` enabled. If any test had crashed the host process, a crash dump would have been collected automatically in the test results directory. All tests passed without issues.
